task_completion.description: Read the operations brief to determine the required configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/winch_ops_brief.txt.

task_completion.description: Set the three required winch parameters in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl's Vehicle Setup -> Parameters screen showing the agent searching for and setting WINCH_RATE_MAX to 2.5, SERVO9_FUNCTION to 46, and/or RC8_OPTION to 45.

task_completion.description: Add Takeoff and Transit (Waypoint) items to the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl's Plan view showing a 'Takeoff' command and at least one 'Waypoint' command in the mission item list on the right side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Add Winch Deployment and Delay commands to the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl's Plan view showing a 'Winch' or 'DO_WINCH' (command 42600) item followed by a 'Delay' or 'NAV_DELAY' item in the mission list.

task_completion.description: Add Winch Retraction and Return to Launch (RTL) commands to the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl's Plan view showing a second 'Winch' or 'DO_WINCH' command (for retraction) followed by a 'Return To Launch' or 'RTL' command at the end of the mission list.

task_completion.description: Export the completed mission plan to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog in QGroundControl or a file manager window showing the mission plan being saved as 'winch_delivery.plan' in the /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl Parameters menu, rather than the agent manually editing parameter files in a text editor or using a python script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl map and mission item list being actively edited, rather than the agent writing a .plan JSON file manually in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent exported the plan using QGroundControl's built-in save/sync functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'File Save' dialog or 'Sync' menu should be visible when saving the .plan file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The operations brief is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/winch_ops_brief.txt. The required vehicle parameters to be set in QGroundControl are WINCH_RATE_MAX: 2.5, SERVO9_FUNCTION: 46, and RC8_OPTION: 45. The final mission plan must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/winch_delivery.plan and must contain Takeoff, Waypoint, DO_WINCH (deployment), NAV_DELAY, DO_WINCH (retraction), and RTL commands.
